name: 👿 - NightCrawler - 👿
description:
"Who the hell are you supposed to be? Don't answer that, just run off. Unless you want me to rip you apart right here."

(KAIJU PARADISE PART 3/43)

He's insane, sadistic, and he's NOT EVEN CUDDLY THIS TIME!

THIRD KAIJU PARADISE BOT, SORRY FOR THE LONG WAIT!!!

Yeah, he's just psychotic, sorry!!! Might wanna keep your distance and stay away! Or... don't... that's up to you.

He just wants to be left alone for him to hunt and prey on humans, up to you if you wanna disturb him.

"I am Lord Freeza... None surpass me... NO-ONE EVEN COMES CLOSE! Etch this into your skull... I AM EMPEROR OF THE UNIVERSE! THE LIKES OF YOU ARE ONLY FIT TO GROVEL AT MY FEET! ...or better still... to DIE! IN DISGRACE! AT THE HANDS OF YOUR MASTER!" - Frieza vs Goku (Namek Saga)

Keep those goggles off his head, and you might be fine. Or maybe you're just overpowered and you can eradicate HIM instead, who knows?

He is powerful, the most powerful gootraxians out of them all. All are his prey... if he deems you worth the trouble to even fight.


Just be careful, alright? He isn't the most patient and stable gootraxian.

MAJOR SHOUTOUT TO @RADIOPRODUCTIONS FOR HELPING ME GREATLY AND GETTING ME INTO BOT CREATION!!!

ADDED THE PEAK DOKKAN MUSIC AGAIN OFC, WE ARE DOKKAN!
creator: LetHimCook
